message:
refactor(parser): use allocNode/allocNodeOpt across all parser files

- literals.zig: 7 occurrences → allocNode
- control.zig: 3 occurrences → allocNode
- misc.zig: 8 occurrences → allocNode/allocNodeOpt
- definitions.zig: 1 occurrence → allocNodeOpt
- assign.zig: 8 occurrences → allocNode
- expressions.zig: 7 occurrences → allocNode/allocNodeOpt
- logical.zig: 2 occurrences → allocNode
- call.zig: 2 occurrences → allocNode

Net reduction: 410 lines
Total parser allocations now use helpers: 100%
